diagrams.title: Partition of Set into Equivalence Classes
diagrams.description: Shows how an equivalence relation partitions a set into disjoint equivalence classes
elements: Three ovals inside representing equivalence classes
Arrows showing elements map to their classes
Labels showing: Non-empty, Disjoint, Union = A
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how equivalence relations create partitions - disjoint subsets that cover the entire set
